upstream_signal_integrity.message: ER V1.7.1 does not mark green unless upstream language/function control permits it.

color_legend.green: Keep: upstream engines confirm good enough language and useful IELTS function.
color_legend.yellow: Improve/check: upstream engines found repair need or sentence-control confirmation is missing.
color_legend.red: Rewrite: upstream engines show low control, multiple local problems, or paragraph-function pressure.

And they stop working, so they need modey from the goverment, for take care with they health. For example in contries like Japan, many old people need care , and this costs a lot of money, or for example Korea.

revision_waves.text: Paragraph(s) 1, 3, 4, 5: rewrite red sentences first using short clear sentences.

copyable_clean_text:
One problem of an ageing population is that government has to spent more money on health care and pensions. Older people often need more medical help than young peoples. And they stop working, so they need modey from the goverment, for take care with they health. For example in contries like Japan, many old people need care , and this costs a lot of money, or for example Korea.

Another issued is that the way be fewer young people working . If too many retire, there are not enough workers to do all the jobs. This can slow down the economy. Some companies may find it hard to find more new workers.

On the other hand, there are also some benefits. Older peoples have a lot of knowledge and experience than young ones. Even they can give good advice , working part-time or doing volunteer work as it possible. For example my grandmother is so older, but she is doing everything for home-things, for her it is easy and so excited things.

Also, older people often help take care of their grandchildren, if parents should go to the work or some kinds of things. This make a family more stronger and friendly. They can teach a children about culture and family traditions , which is very important nowadays.

In conclusion, even though an ageing population can cause some problems, like a high costs and fewer workers, I believe that the advantages are also important. Older people still help society in many ways and situations. In many ways, if government makes good ability to older peoples, that will be the best plan to all countries.

And they stop working, so they need modey from the goverment, for take care with they health. For example in contries like Japan, many old people need care , and this costs a lot of money, or for example Korea.

Another issued is that the way be fewer young people working . If too many retire, there are not enough workers to do all the jobs. This can slow down the economy. Some companies may find it hard to find more new workers.

On the other hand, there are also some benefits. Older peoples have a lot of knowledge and experience than young ones. Even they can give good advice , working part-time or doing volunteer work as it possible. For example my grandmother is so older, but she is doing everything for home-things, for her it is easy and so excited things.

Also, older people often help take care of their grandchildren, if parents should go to the work or some kinds of things. This make a family more stronger and friendly. They can teach a children about culture and family traditions , which is very important nowadays.

In conclusion, even though an ageing population can cause some problems, like a high costs and fewer workers, I believe that the advantages are also important. Older people still help society in many ways and situations. In many ways, if government makes good ability to older peoples, that will be the best plan to all countries.

I checked the conclusion: final answer and main reasons, no new example.
I checked spelling and grammar after rewriting.

prewriting_guidance.title: Before you write or revise

structure_options.name: Universal IELTS Task 2 structure
paragraphs: Introduction: task frame, clear answer/position, preview main ideas.
Body 1: one main idea, explanation, specific example, link.
Body 2: one main idea, explanation, specific example, link.
Conclusion: summary + final answer. No new example or idea.

body_paragraph_formula: Topic sentence: say the paragraph's main idea.
Argument/reason: explain why the idea matters.
Development: add cause, effect, comparison, or consequence.
Link back: connect the example to the question or your position.

example_quality.strong_example_rule: Use a specific place/actor/programme/situation, show what happened, and link it to the argument.
example_quality.weak_example_rule: Avoid private family anecdotes or very general examples as the main evidence.
